package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepeatedJsonMarshaling() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_json_marshaling"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "encoding/json.Marshal or MarshalIndent inside loops \u2014 repeated allocation and serialization hot spots."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
